FGO-POTION_I_D.title: Some Kind of Potion
FGO-POTION_I_D.description: Little  pieces  that get put together  into a description.  Exactly how depends on the potion, and you can set it up however you want.
FGO-ELIXIROF_REJUVENATION.title: 返老还童的灵药
FGO-ELIXIROF_REJUVENATION.description: 回复 %d 点生命。移除你身上的所有负面效果。

FGO-EXTREMELY_SPICY_MAPO_TOFU.descriptio: 获得 40%*宝具值*或 40% 宝具威力 。
